name: Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort
address: 4/5 Moo 3 Pae Klaeng Kram Road, Chark Pomg, Klaeng, Klaeng, Rayong, Thái Lan
description:
Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort - Nơi lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ tại Rayong, Thái Lan

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort là một khách sạn 4.0 sao nằm tại thành phố Rayong, Thái Lan. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn cung cấp một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố này. Với 189 phòng nghỉ hiện đại và tiện nghi, Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời.

Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và quyền trả phòng cho đến 12:00 PM. Điều này giúp du khách có thời gian linh hoạt để tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ mà không phải lo lắng về việc trả phòng sớm. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón từ sân bay với thời gian chỉ mất khoảng 180 phút, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và thuận lợi trong việc di chuyển.

Với chính sách đặc biệt dành cho trẻ em, Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 15 tuổi ở miễn phí. Điều này làm cho khách sạn trở thành một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho gia đình muốn có một kỳ nghỉ thú vị và tiết kiệm chi phí. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng nằm cách trung tâm thành phố chỉ 40 km, giúp du khách dễ dàng khám phá những điểm tham quan và trung tâm mua sắm.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort tọa lạc tại Rayong, Thái Lan, cung cấp một loạt các tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khi lưu trú tại resort này, du khách có thể tham gia mua sắm tại các cửa hàng tiện lợi trong khuôn viên hoặc thưởng thức đồ uống tại quầy bar sang trọng. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và tái tạo năng lượng, hãy trải nghiệm các liệu pháp mát-xa chuyên nghiệp hoặc thưởng thức những phút giây thư giãn trong bồn nước nóng, phòng xông hơi hoặc phòng sauna.

Cơ sở vật chất thể thao tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort tọa lạc tại Rayong, Thái Lan, là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích hoạt động thể thao. Khách sạn cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng, bao gồm sân golf (trên chỗ), phòng tập thể dục, các môn thể thao trên nước (không sử dụng động cơ), hồ bơi ngoài trời và bãi biển riêng. Du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh tươi mát tại sân golf, hoặc rèn luyện sức khỏe tại phòng tập thể dục hiện đại. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp các dịch vụ như câu cá, bóng bàn, lặn biển, đi cần, cho thuê thiết bị trượt tuyết, cho thuê thiết bị thể thao trên nước, lặn biển và snorkeling. Bãi biển tuyệt đẹp của khách sạn cũng là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tham gia các hoạt động thể thao trên nước. Với những tiện ích thể thao đa dạng này, Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort chắc chắn sẽ mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm thú vị và sảng khoái.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort tọa lạc tại Rayong, Thái Lan, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi hàng đầu. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giặt là, dịch vụ phòng, két an toàn, lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng, khu vực hút thuốc riêng, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, giặt khô, dịch vụ nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh, lưu trữ hành lý và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày. Với những tiện ích này, du khách có thể tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ dễ dàng và tiện lợi tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort tọa lạc tại Rayong, Thái Lan, và cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn một cách thuận tiện và nhanh chóng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón miễn phí trong khu vực xung quanh, giúp khách hàng tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong việc di chuyển.

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort cũng có các tiện nghi vận chuyển khác như dịch vụ đỗ xe tự động, dịch vụ đỗ xe miễn phí, và dịch vụ thuê xe. Khách hàng có thể yên tâm về việc đỗ xe tại khách sạn với dịch vụ đỗ xe tự động và đỗ xe miễn phí. Nếu khách hàng muốn khám phá vùng lân cận, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ thuê xe, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng di chuyển và khám phá các địa điểm thú vị.

Tiện nghi phòng tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort cung cấp những tiện nghi phòng đẳng cấp để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho khách. Mỗi phòng đều được trang bị hệ thống điều hòa không khí hiện đại để giữ cho không gian lúc nào cũng mát mẻ. Bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng sự thoải mái với bộ áo choàng tắm mềm mại và tiện lợi. Để giữ cho mái tóc luôn gọn gàng, khách cũng được cung cấp máy sấy tóc chuyên nghiệp.

Để giải trí, mỗi phòng còn được trang bị một chiếc TV màn hình phẳng với đầu thu vệ tinh và các kênh truyền hình cáp. Bạn cũng có thể thư giãn trên ban công hoặc sân hiên riêng của phòng. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể sử dụng mini bar và tủ lạnh trong phòng để lưu trữ và thưởng thức các đồ uống và đồ ăn nhẹ tùy ý.

Trải nghiệm ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort không chỉ nổi tiếng với các tiện nghi và dịch vụ tuyệt vời, mà còn là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích ẩm thực. Khách sạn cung cấp đa dạng các tiện nghi ăn uống để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của du khách.

Quý khách có thể tận hưởng ẩm thực truyền thống và đa dạng tại nhà hàng của khách sạn. Với không gian sang trọng và menu phong phú, nhà hàng sẽ mang đến cho quý khách những món ăn ngon và độc đáo từ khắp nơi trên thế giới. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có dịch vụ phòng ăn 24/7, cho phép quý khách thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại phòng mà không cần ra ngoài.

Nếu quý khách muốn thưởng thức một ly cà phê thơm ngon hoặc một bữa sáng ngon lành, quý khách có thể ghé qua quầy cà phê của khách sạn. Nơi đây, quý khách sẽ được thưởng thức những loại cà phê đặc biệt và các món ăn nhẹ hấp dẫn. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng ăn và bữa sáng kiểu lục địa hàng ngày để đảm bảo quý khách có một ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng.

Các loại phòng tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort cung cấp nhiều loại phòng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Có các phòng Deluxe với 1 giường cỡ King, tầm nhìn ra vườn, diện tích 37 mét vuông. Có cả phòng Deluxe với 2 giường đơn, tầm nhìn ra vườn, diện tích 37 mét vuông. Ngoài ra, còn có các phòng Premier với 1 giường cỡ King, tầm nhìn ra vườn hoặc hồ bơi. Các phòng Premier còn có các loại phòng với 2 giường đơn, tầm nhìn ra vườn hoặc hồ bơi. Nếu bạn muốn có không gian sống riêng, có thể lựa chọn Premier Suite với 1 giường cỡ King, tầm nhìn ra biển và phòng khách riêng. Ngoài ra còn có các phòng Superior với 1 giường cỡ King hoặc 2 giường đơn, tầm nhìn ra vườn, diện tích 37 mét vuông. Còn nếu bạn muốn không gian sống lớn hơn, có thể chọn Superior Suite với 1 giường cỡ King, tầm nhìn ra biển và phòng khách riêng. Đặt phòng tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort trên Agoda sẽ giúp bạn có được giá tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối.

Khám phá Klaeng - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng tại Rayong, Thái Lan

Klaeng là một thành phố ven biển tuyệt đẹp nằm ở tỉnh Rayong, Thái Lan. Với bãi biển dài và cát trắng mịn, Klaeng là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng yên bình và tràn đầy năng lượng.

Nằm cách Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort chỉ trong vài phút lái xe, Klaeng có nhiều điểm tham quan hấp dẫn. Du khách có thể khám phá vẻ đẹp tự nhiên tại Công viên quốc gia Khao Laem Ya-Mu Ko Samet, nơi có rừng nhiệt đới, biển xanh biếc và động vật hoang dã đa dạng. Ngoài ra, Klaeng cũng nổi tiếng với chợ cá truyền thống, nơi du khách có thể tận hưởng hương vị tươi ngon của hải sản tươi sống.

Không chỉ có thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp, Klaeng còn có nền văn hóa đa dạng và lịch sử phong phú. Du khách có thể tham quan các ngôi chùa và đền thờ lịch sử như Wat Sanam Chai và Wat Pa Pradu, để khám phá văn hóa và tín ngưỡng độc đáo của khu vực. Đến Klaeng, du khách sẽ được trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ thú vị và đáng nhớ tại một trong những điểm đến đẹp nhất của Thái Lan.

Hướng dẫn đến Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort từ sân bay gần Rayong

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort là một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời nằm ở Klaeng, Rayong, Thái Lan. Để đến đây từ sân bay gần Rayong, bạn có một số lựa chọn tiện lợi. 

Sân bay quốc tế U-Tapao Rayong-Pattaya (UTP) là sân bay gần nhất với khoảng cách khoảng 50 km từ Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort. Bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi hoặc xe đưa đón từ sân bay để đến khu nghỉ mát. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay U-Tapao Rayong-Pattaya đến Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort khoảng 1 giờ. 

Nếu bạn đến từ sân bay quốc tế Suvarnabhumi (BKK) ở Bangkok, có một số lựa chọn để đến Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort. Bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi hoặc xe đưa đón từ sân bay đến bến xe Ekkamai hoặc bến xe Mochit ở Bangkok, sau đó đi xe buýt hoặc xe khách đến Rayong. Từ Rayong, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi hoặc xe đưa đón để đến Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort, cách đó khoảng 10 km. Thời gian di chuyển từ sân bay Suvarnabhumi đến Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort khoảng 3-4 giờ, tùy thuộc vào lưu lượng giao thông.

Khám phá những điểm tham quan xung quanh Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort nằm gần nhiều điểm tham quan nổi tiếng tại Rayong, Thái Lan. Du khách có thể dễ dàng khám phá vẻ đẹp tuyệt vời của Laem Mae Phim, một bãi biển tuyệt đẹp với cát trắng và nước biển trong xanh. Nơi đây là lựa chọn lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng những ngày nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời.

Ngoài ra, còn có HTMS Prasae Memorial, một điểm tham quan lịch sử quan trọng, nơi du khách có thể khám phá những bức tượng và di tích liên quan đến lịch sử hải quân Thái Lan. Rayong Botanical Garden cũng là một điểm đến thú vị, với hơn 400 loài cây cỏ và hoa quý hiếm. Du khách có thể tận hưởng không gian xanh mát và tham quan các khu vườn đẹp tại đây.

Với vị trí thuận lợi, Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort là một điểm dừng chân lý tưởng để khám phá những điểm tham quan độc đáo và tận hưởng những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại Rayong, Thái Lan.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Khi lưu trú tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort, bạn sẽ có nhiều lựa chọn nhà hàng ngon nơi gần đó. Wassana Fishing Park (Restaurant) là một điểm đến tuyệt vời để thưởng thức các món ăn hải sản tươi ngon. Muai Pad Thai là nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức một trong những món Pad Thai ngon nhất. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức hải sản tươi sống, Nong Nueng Seafood và Cho Cho Seafood là hai nhà hàng lý tưởng. Ban Lung Thong Restaurant cung cấp các món ăn truyền thống địa phương, trong khi Three Tree Beach Restaurant mang đến không gian ẩm thực tuyệt vời bên biển. DRIFT Bar: Ao Khai là một địa điểm tuyệt vời để thưởng thức đồ uống và ngắm hoàng hôn. Ton Krabok, Pla-O Seafoods và La Capanna mae phim beach cũng là những lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho bữa ăn ngon tại khu vực này.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort so với Rayong

Với mức giá phòng trung bình là $75, Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort là một sự lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn trải nghiệm sự sang trọng và tiện nghi tại Rayong, Thái Lan. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại thành phố Rayong là $58, giá của Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort có phần cao hơn nhưng hoàn toàn xứng đáng với những tiện ích và dịch vụ tuyệt vời mà nơi này mang lại. Khách sạn nằm bên bãi biển Rayong, mang đến cho du khách không gian nghỉ dưỡng yên bình và tuyệt đẹp, cùng với các tiện nghi như hồ bơi, nhà hàng và spa cao cấp. Với mức giá hợp lý, khách sạn này đảm bảo mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ tại Rayong.

Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort là một khách sạn sạch sẽ và được tổ chức rất tốt, với những hồ bơi đẹp. Nhân viên rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Chúng tôi rất yêu nơi này, yên tĩnh và đẹp. Bữa tiệc tối Giáng sinh tuyệt vời với tiết mục trình diễn trực tiếp, và nhân viên dễ thương là những người chủ tiếp đã làm cho kỳ nghỉ của chúng tôi thêm phần thú vị. Cơ sở vật chất tốt, bữa sáng ngon, dịch vụ tốt. Dịch vụ xuất sắc. Đồ ăn tuyệt vời và giá cả hợp lý. Thật sự tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. Đa dạng và thú vị, bữa sáng rất ngon. Hồ bơi ở đây tuyệt vời, rất phù hợp cho gia đình.

Sự hài lòng của khách hàng với Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort

Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Rayong, Thái Lan. Với điểm đánh giá tổng thể 8.0, khách hàng đã chứng minh rằng đây là một nơi lưu trú tuyệt vời.

Một trong những điểm đáng chú ý của khách sạn này là giá trị tuyệt vời mà nó mang lại. Với điểm đánh giá 7.8 về giá trị, khách hàng đã cho biết rằng Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort cung cấp một trải nghiệm lưu trú tốt đáng giá tiền bỏ ra. Với các tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chất lượng, đây là một sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn và thoải mái.

Khách sạn cũng được đánh giá cao về các tiện nghi và dịch vụ mà nó cung cấp. Với điểm đánh giá 8.0 cho các tiện nghi, khách hàng đã ghi nhận rằng Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort có đầy đủ các tiện ích cần thiết để đáp ứng nhu cầu của du khách. Từ các hồ bơi ngoài trời đẹp mắt đến nhà hàng và quầy bar sang trọng, du khách sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy nhàm chán khi lưu trú tại đây. 

Với sự sạch sẽ đáng kinh ngạc, Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort đã nhận được điểm đánh giá 8.3. Du khách đã chia sẻ rằng khách sạn luôn được duy trì sạch sẽ và gọn gàng, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng để thư giãn và nghỉ ngơi. Vị trí của khách sạn cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm 8.2, cho thấy nơi này thuận tiện cho việc khám phá các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng trong khu vực.

Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao sự thoải mái và hiệu suất của nhân viên tại Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort. Với điểm đánh giá 7.8 về sự thoải mái và 8.0 về hiệu suất nhân viên, khách hàng đã nhận thấy rằng nhân viên tại đây thân thiện và nhiệt tình, luôn sẵn sàng để hỗ trợ và đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của khách.

sample_comments.text: Nhân viên dễ thương từ nhân viên lễ tân đến nhân viên dọn dẹp. Phòng ở thì chấp nhận được nhưng phòng bên cạnh mở đóng cửa thì có tiếng ồn vào trong phòng. Không gian bên trong chỗ ở yên tĩnh, bình yên, phù hợp cho việc nghỉ ngơi với gia đình. Trong khách sạn có đủ cả nhà hàng, quán cà phê, điều quan trọng là nằm ngay sát bãi biển, vào là không cần đi đâu cả. Bữa sáng rất phong phú, nhiều đến mức không biết chọn ăn gì.

ขอขอบพระคุณเป็นอย่างยิ่งสำหรับความคิดเห็นอันอบอุ่นและละเอียดของท่านค่ะ 

เรารู้สึกยินดีเป็นอย่างมากที่ได้ทราบว่าท่านประทับใจกับการบริการของพนักงานทุกฝ่าย ตั้งแต่พนักงานต้อนรับไปจนถึงพนักงานทำความสะอาด ซึ่งทีมงานของเราตั้งใจดูแลผู้เข้าพักด้วยความใส่ใจและรอยยิ้มเสมอ คำชื่นชมของท่านถือเป็นกำลังใจสำคัญให้กับพวกเราทุกคนอย่างยิ่งค่ะ
เรายังดีใจที่ท่านได้เพลิดเพลินกับบรรยากาศที่เงียบสงบ เหมาะสำหรับการพักผ่อนกับครอบครัว รวมถึงสิ่งอำนวยความสะดวกภายในโรงแรม ไม่ว่าจะเป็นร้านอาหาร ร้านกาแฟ ทำเลติดชายหาด และอาหารเช้าที่มีความหลากหลาย ซึ่งเราตั้งใจจัดเตรียมเพื่อให้ผู้เข้าพักสามารถใช้เวลาพักผ่อนได้อย่างสะดวกสบายโดยแทบไม่ต้องออกไปไหนเลย

อย่างไรก็ตาม ทางโรงแรมต้องขออภัยสำหรับความไม่สะดวกเรื่องเสียงจากการเปิด-ปิดประตูของห้องข้างเคียงที่รบกวนระหว่างการเข้าพักของท่าน เราเข้าใจดีว่าสิ่งนี้อาจส่งผลต่อความผ่อนคลาย และจะส่งต่อความคิดเห็นของท่านให้ทีมงานที่เกี่ยวข้องตรวจสอบแนวทางในการลดผลกระทบด้านเสียง เพื่อยกระดับความสะดวกสบายให้แก่ผู้เข้าพักมากยิ่งขึ้น

sample_comments.title: Great stay for a couple of days
sample_comments.positives: Excellent breakfast. Clean private beach. Large swimming pools and a nice gym.
sample_comments.negatives: The rooms aren't very large. TV had problems working, and the water would often change temperature randomly.

sample_comments.title: Rude front office
sample_comments.text: Front office staff were rude. Room slippers were torn. Accused of missing slippers without checking the room, it was found in the room.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Namrut,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. I am truly sorry to hear that your recent stay at our resort did not meet your expectations.

Please accept my sincerest apologies for the issues you experienced.

As for the slippers and laundry bag, I have followed up with both Housekeeping and our reception team. I was informed that the slippers were indeed found inside the safety box and returned to the team during checkout. I regret that this was not handled more graciously on our end, and I apologize if the tone or manner in which the issue was addressed caused further frustration.

Thank you again for your feedback. I regret that your stay did not reflect the high standards we aim to deliver and hope that we will have a chance to better serve you in the future.

Warm regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Poorly run hotel with bad breakfast & unfriendly staff at a great location
sample_comments.positives:
A positive feature of the site is a small coffee shop that serves Starbucks coffee, but not very good pastries or food unfortunately. It's also a bit warm and it closes at 4pm already. Nevertheless it sort of saved the day for me as I have to usually work a couple of hours a day. 

The location of the hotel on the other hand is perfect, with direct access to the beach. There are a number of pools which aren't big but big enough. The food at the restaurant is good enough with a great view.
sample_comments.negatives:
The suite is big and spacious, but arranged in a slightly strange way - presumably due to old-fashioned layout of the building. The bathroom is comparatively small, without a separate toilet. Windows and screen doors are quite outdated, and the overall design of the room is very plain and basic. The A/C worked well enough, but was quite loud, with hideous A/C units in front of the rooms. The hallway leading up to the room is dark and feels like a cheap apartment building. The TV worked but there was not a single movie channel to watch.

The gym in this place is an absolute disaster and quite frankly a safety hazard. The elliptical machines don't really work (and are probably 20 years old), and the weight machine in the center of the gym must be at least 30 years old. I've been to countless hotel gyms around the world - including ones with old equipment, but I have never seen anything like this. The weight plates are literally cracked - it's an absolute mystery to me how this does not get addressed by an international hotel chain.

The service isn't great but good enough, however I was extremely disappointed with the overall friendliness and quality of service at the resort. Almost every hotel I have been to in Thailand has extremely friendly and courteous staff, that will greet you even when you are just walking around the property. Not so at the Sofitel however, you never feel welcome or appreciated. You don't even get greeted when you walk through the lobby, which I found somewhat shocking.

The breakfast is mediocre at best, and again, one of the worst I have experienced in Thailand. Don't expect good bread, (edible) pastries or a wide fruit selection. On most days they didn't even have bananas, we were lucky enough to have Papaya on 2 of the 5 days. Thankfully they have a fairly decent coffee machine and an omelet station, but that's about it. Even the jam selection was pathetic.

sample_comments.title: Disappointing compared with other Novotels
sample_comments.text: As acknowledged by the hotel management, the Internet and television systems are both presently below expectations and below the standard of other Novotel hotels. The hotel had several groups staying when I was there and the reception staff gave me an inappropriate room located furthest away from the beach (not visible at all from the balcony). I could only see a decrepit water tower and overgrown garden of the neighbouring property. There was no privacy on the balcony which had insect issues (a notice on the doors advised residents to keep the doors closed) and there was road noise from trucks and other vehicles using the road at the front of the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed with Novotel Accor Group
sample_comments.text:
I grew up with the notion that Novotel was synonymous with good accommodation. So We were elated to have found a NOVOTEL RESORT in Rayong.

We were really dissapointed with their service a management style.

They gave us two room facing the parking lot on a beach resort? When we complained they upgrade us to two room facing a next door grabage dump.

Who drive three hours from Bangkok to Rayong to stay on a room like that?

Finally we had to pay extra for a upgraded room with a better view on another wing on the third floor but no lift.

I was sad to acknowledge to my family that the Novotel service standard has gone down the drain.
The Novotel I used to know will have not even make those ugly view room available for free, let alone charge for it.

This one of the worst experience I got booking online.

Will never visit any Novotel from now on.

sample_comments.title: Declining standards

There is currently some renovation work at this hotel, which spoils a holiday experience. I was surprised neither Agoda or Accor forewarned me.
Novotel try their best to make this hotel to their standard, but fail due to the hotels owner, a shame, I would not classify it as 3 star Novotel, more a two star. F & B terrible, was good two years ago but standards have slipped

sample_comments.negatives: Once you get there, not much to do unless you have a car.

sample_comments.title: Great view, great pool, perfect beachwalk
Awful one of the most dysfunctional hotels ever
sample_comments.text:
I hate giving bad reviews but this hotel deserves it. 
Hopefully the new HK GM & Thai VP can solve the many problems this place has? 

1. The first problem is location. it is better for the traveller to book directly in Koh Samet..nothing here worth staying for, even as a stop over as we found out. 

2.This hotels hires 4 cheap trainee staff from the Ph. 
What for is a big question? 
I can understand why 2 work in reception, but all the Thai staff speak English anyway. 

The empty restaurant bar by the pool has two further Filipina waitresses, who told me, how much they hated this job, because they hate Thai food-(to hot)& Thais, because when they serve Thais clients, they naturally speak English. 
The Thai clients are offended and ask them to speak Thai, they reply they are not Thai! 
The Thai clients reply they want a Thai waitress that speaks Thai...actually Thai or Filipino staff were 100% unhappy. 

There is many more to report in respect to scams. 
A hotel from Hell!..Still I wish the HK Gm and the VP good luck in sorting the many problems out!

sample_comments.room_type: Premier Room 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Highway Robbery
sample_comments.text:
The hotel is located 20 or 30 km from Rayong city and rather than offer a reasonable mode of transportation they charge 1800 baht round trip. That is about $60 US for a 60 minute taxi ride. almost 1 week salary for Thailand. Hence "Highway Robbery". 
One evening we decided we wanted an ice cream novelty. Since no 7-eleven close the hotel was the place to buy. They charged us 600 baht for 2 ice cream bars. I thought it was ridiculous but it was a romantic night, we don't drink alcohol and it was hot outside and we decided to pay. I was angry but we wanted them....you know we only live once. The following day as we walked past the same freezer we noticed a sign that CLEARLY stated the price was 20 baht for the same treat. I decided to mention this to the front desk as I thought maybe an employee was ripping us off. The response was chilling. The desk clerk laughed and said they indeed raise the price when there is no competition.
Needless to say I will never return to this hotel or ANY OTHER Novotel or any of their sister hotels. They truly suck canal water.

sample_comments.title: Nice beach, quite but too hot. Very Bad Sevice
sample_comments.text:
We stayed there for 1 night. We have 1 year old girl and a 2 years old boy. We requsted a baby cot at the front and they said they will bring to the room. And we arrived around noon. Then we went to swim. Then me and my girl came back around 4PM. We still hadn't got the baby cot. So I called to the front and wait for about 30 mins. I would say at this part they are slow. The front said they have many cue so we have to wait. Ok then. 

But when the baby cot arrived, I put my little girl into the crib then i went to get change. She screamed and i ran and found out that she fell into the hole!!!! The baby cot didn't have the wood board to support to mattress!!!!!... They just put the mattress on the top of the wood structure which have alot of nails stick out !!!! I cann't even think what would happen if she get the nail pierce to her. That's so bad service!!!! I called and told the front about the baby cot. They said they will send the people to come to check. So I waited about 30 mins again. For me, in the case like this and the big hotel like this, when the customer complained like this they should be faster as they can. Not just slow like this.

Then the housekeeper arrived and said, she will change to a new one. That's it. That's all they said. And they just said that is another housekeeper fault. For me, I don't want to ask for anything but i feel like they should do better than said that is another housekeepers' fault. And my girl didn't hurt just shock alittle bit so i let it go. I am writing this to a family who will request a baby cot. You should check your baby cot first before you put your baby into it. Because your baby might not be lucky as mine. Especially, if your baby is still little. The baby's head can crack to the floor.

sample_comments.title: Overrated hotel

The parking space is limited when the guests are too full (need to park along the mainroad in front of the hotel entrance) The hot water shower is terribly fluctuated, really dangerous to be extremely hot even putting to the 'normal' position while showering (my husband got 1st degree-burned from this). Because of too crowded guests, the buffet breakfast ran out super quick and too slow to refill. The hotel wall is too thin, so the noise along the hallway comes in. There is no elevator in the building, and people used the swimming pools walked back to the room soaking all the way so the stairs were dangerously slippery. Overall, unpleasant stayed.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: I booked here because I thought the hotel name was similar to one I had stayed at in Bangkok, which was very good in every way. However, I was disappointed with this place in Rayong. It's a good thing I only booked one night because I thought I would try it first and then decide, and I was right. The room stated it could accommodate 3 people, but when I checked in, I had to pay for an extra bed at a cost of 1100 baht, and upon check-out it was 1150 baht. Disappointment 1: There was only one very flat pillow provided, and the mattress was not soft, causing irritation. The room was advertised as upgraded, but upon checking in, it was at the end of the hallway. When I entered, the bathroom door had cracks, the toilet was very small, and the room door also had cracks. There were no towels provided, so I had to request them. There were no dishes or utensils available, and if I wanted them, there would be an additional charge, which other hotels do not have. Disappointment 2: The Wi-Fi was not working, and I had to wait for a technician to come and fix it, having to call multiple times for them to check it. By the time I could use it, it was six o'clock, which was quite unreasonable. Disappointment 3: The cleanliness was just okay. The air conditioning was normal. The dining area was rather far, and if there were any promotions, they wouldn't deliver it to the room. When I went to buy something, there were no bags provided for customers to carry, so I had to carry things without a bag. Disappointment 4: The breakfast was diverse, which was good, but when I came in to relax before checking out, I was shocked by the very loud sounds of repairs going on, which was unbearable. Disappointment 5: If you plan to stay here, you need to prepare everything yourself and choose a better view because there is nothing wow about this place.

Seems management is taking no interest. My family and I have been staying here for 15 years and watching it diminish in quality and maintenance. Can only assume tgere is a plan to renovate. 

Saw a woman fall THRU the deck when it collapsed under her. Best they could offer was for the pool attendant to put ice in a service the. Then offered a free massage! No management visited her and no offer of medical assistance. Another example was ripped umbrellas not replaced and any with a small tear left for the wind to totally destroy. Plates etc left around the pool overnight - not nice to come down to in the morning. 

2hiyrs notice of a wedding taking up areas and expected noise. We guests just did not count. 

Food of such a poor standard as to see the guests visiting the "cafe" across the road. Staff have become slovenly., though sweet. There has been no attempt to improve the fare. 

Think the heart has gone out of the establishment. Shame on Nibitel, it was a little gem

sample_comments.title: Quiet Location on the Beach but past its best
sample_comments.text:
Was hoping for big things as a bolt hole from where I live in Pattaya to come and relax with the family.
Booked a non smoking room and was told we could not have a non smoking room and only smoking was available, even when I pointed out that I was with my 6 month old daughter and we did not want a smoking room they were unable or unwilling to change nor was a non smoking upgrade offered...Bad start
Hotel itself is quite remote you will need a car to get about the plus side is that the beach itself is nice and quiet.
The room I booked was standard and was fine enough a bit frayed around the edges but suitable for the cheap price the staff bought a baby cot as requested immediately which was good.
Breakfast buffet was average at best and I'm comparing this only with the numerous Thai hotels I've stayed in over the years.
First night (wet season) there was a massive storm so all the electrics got knocked out including the air con.

My review was not intending to sound so negative at he beginning but thats the way I remember it.

sample_comments.title: Private Area
sample_comments.text: My friends & I were traveling on a group of eleven people and visited this resort in May 2012. However, we had a very unpleasant experience with the shuttle bus driver of this hotel. We booked a shuttle bus service to Ban pier at 12:30pm on 13 May 2012. However, the driver dropped us off at a different pier. We requested him to send us back to the Ban pier but were ignored. Then the driver was talking to another woman in Thai language which we couldn't understand and then left. Our plan was to go to the Ban Pier to catch the free shuttle boat at 1:30pm to Samed Club Hotel. So we asked the woman whom the shuttle bus driver talked with to see if any free shuttle boat was available there. She replied if we wanted to go to Samed Club, we needed to pay for the boat. At that moment, we were so confused and helpless. So we asked another person for assistances and discovered that we were in the prier named Munisit the Prarati Pier. It sounds ridiculus that the hotel driver doesn't know the location of Ban Pier. It was very clear that the hotel provides shuttle bus service go to Ban Pier only but why we were dropped us off at another pier. As a result, we missed the free shuttle boat. Eventually, we were forced to pay 3300THB for the boat service go to Samed Club from Munisit the Prarati Pier. As the frequent visitors of Thailand, we were so disappointed to be treated like this.

sample_comments.title: Don't stay here until December 2011
sample_comments.text:
We reserved three nights at the Novotel Rim Pae Resort Rayong. The main pool and the Italian restaurant are under reconstruction and jack hammers go from morning until night. A notice claims the work will be finished by October. My guess is it will be at least December. The pictures tell the story.

The poolside ground floor balcony to our room was dusty and the pot plants were dying from lack of water. An accumulation of cigarette butts in the pots reflected on poor room management.

A green snake, was between us and our room after breakfast.There were plenty of creepy crawlies for nature lovers.

The wind on the beach is relentless; better to vacation at Koh Samui at this time of the year. The choppy waves here are unpleasant, the beach sand is brown, and sewage is washed up onto the beach. You will be alone if you swim in the ocean.

The resort is 37 kms south of Rayong city and a long way from anywhere with no local attractions to visit. Saturday night dinner in the resort restaurant was marred by a university faculty singing karaoke in the adjoining room while people on cellphones from that room invaded the restaurant to talk at the top of their voices on subjects from car repairs to house moves. Outside, the Truscott family had a reunion with 20 children who screamed and yelled and played from 6:50am in the pool outside our room and banged doors until midnight.

The Thai restaurant across the road from the resort is recommended for breakfast, lunch and dinner at a quarter the price of the resort; it's quiet. The food's good; breakfast of freshly squeezed orange juice, coffee, two eggs any style, bacon and toast cost Baht 120 or $4. Thai and western food is available all day.

We left a day ahead of schedule - forfeiting the money paid in advance for the third night. Fortunately we had a hire car so we could escape! Such was our "quiet weekend away from Bangkok."
Room Tip: Go to Koh Samui instead.

sample_comments.title: Novotel Rim Pae Resort
sample_comments.text: The Novotel Rim Pae Resort is a quiet and out of the way resort approximately 30 km from Rayong. The resort must be 15-20 years old and really requires some renovation and innovative management. It would rate as 3.5 stars. sample_comments.title: Private Area
sample_comments.text: My friends & I were traveling on a group of eleven people and visited this resort in May 2012. However, we had a very unpleasant experience with the shuttle bus driver of this hotel. We booked a shuttle bus service to Ban pier at 12:30pm on 13 May 2012. However, the driver dropped us off at a different pier. We requested him to send us back to the Ban pier but were ignored. Then the driver was talking to another woman in Thai language which we couldn't understand and then left. Our plan was to go to the Ban Pier to catch the free shuttle boat at 1:30pm to Samed Club Hotel. So we asked the woman whom the shuttle bus driver talked with to see if any free shuttle boat was available there. She replied if we wanted to go to Samed Club, we needed to pay for the boat. At that moment, we were so confused and helpless. So we asked another person for assistances and discovered that we were in the prier named Munisit the Prarati Pier. It sounds ridiculus that the hotel driver doesn't know the location of Ban Pier. It was very clear that the hotel provides shuttle bus service go to Ban Pier only but why we were dropped us off at another pier. As a result, we missed the free shuttle boat. Eventually, we were forced to pay 3300THB for the boat service go to Samed Club from Munisit the Prarati Pier. As the frequent visitors of Thailand, we were so disappointed to be treated like this.

sample_comments.title: Family 2 Room Pool View
sample_comments.text:
1) There was no welcome drink upon arrival. I found out later, when I reached the restaurant on the second night, from the staff that there was hibiscus juice.
2) The room was spacious, but the dust on the curtains and the noise from the balcony door was loud and stiff.
3) Chinese guests stayed and washed their feet in the swimming pool. The pool water had debris like leaves and branches, and some pools were cloudy, but the pool by the sea was clean and nice to use, with a good atmosphere.
4) We came to the beach but there wasn't a single seafood dish served. Breakfast included noodle soup with meatballs, which wasn't delicious. The congee was bland and consisted only of rice. The stir-fried noodles had wide noodles and Chinese kale, the ham was not good, the sausage was acceptable but average, the salad was quite good, the mashed potatoes were bland, and the spinach with cheese was not tasty. The fruit juices available were orange juice, guava juice, apple cider, but I preferred the butterfly pea drink and chrysanthemum tea more.
5) The hotel's restaurant had a limited food selection and expensive prices. There was a pizza deal of 2 for 1 (the salmon topping was not very fresh, like smoked salty salmon).
6) The accommodation was by the beach, with a small kids' club. The beach sand near the accommodation was a bit dirty, and you had to wear shoes to go out and put them down close to the sea. The sea had strong waves, but it was clean and fun to play in.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Khun Waraporn, 

Thank you for your feedback. We apologize for the inconveniences you experienced during your stay, including the welcome drink, room cleanliness, pool maintenance, breakfast quality, and beach area. Your comments are valuable to us, and we will address these issues to improve our services. We hope to welcome you back for a better experience.

Best regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Hotel okay but room dreadful
sample_comments.text: The hotel is located on a nice quiet beach with good facilities. Booked a king superior room. The room was past it's use by date. Been driving all day so went to bed around 9pm. Just getting to sleep when a bright flash went off in the room. Didn't know what was happening. Getting back to sleep again then a loud click followed by a bright flash again. Just like a camera. After the third time I got out of bed to watch. After some time it happened again. Appeared to come from around the light near the entry. Rang reception, a man came up, told him it could be the light but he went into the ceiling. Eventually he came down plus removed the light. Got back into bed but a short time later flash happened again. I went to reception and asked for another room. No king rooms available so had to move to a twin across the hall. Midnight by this stage - wrecked sleep. Believe it or not, the flashing started in the new room sometime during the next night. Wife insisted on leaving the lights on for the rest of the night. Another wrecked night's sleep. The least that management could have done is put us in a better room not a worse one and given us some type of refund. Will be following up with Accor.

sample_comments.title: Novotel Rayong Rim Pae Resort
sample_comments.text:
I went in this hotel only to be quiet. the price was good for the quality, but the staff was not efficient, I had some many problems in my room, with the key, internet and save box. The air conditioned is so noisy.
But this hotel is lovely with a small garden and severals swimming pools.

sample_comments.title: Nice Hotel on a quiet beach
Nice rooms, swimming pool and qutie
sample_comments.text: very impressive

sample_comments.title: OK stay
sample_comments.text: It was a family vacation, and the staff was great, however forget eating in their Italian Restaurant, the food was bad bad bad. It had nothing to do with Italian cuisine. The checkout process was the worst I have encountered in any hotel I have stayed in. It also took them over 3 hours to get a baby crib delivered to our room, even though I had asked for one when I made my reservation. But as long as you don't eat in their Restaurants, the resort in nice.

sample_comments.title: Nice Pools, Nice Beach, Not Enough Chairs
sample_comments.text: If you are a city person, this resort is isolated with no way to flag a taxi. They have van service to the nearest towns only several times per day. With that said, it is the isolation, the love of sea and sand as well as the great view that keeps you here. It is "kid friendly" and a real family hotel. The staff members are very kind and accepting of small children even though it has no high chairs for babies 7mos - 18 mos. Restaurant service by the pool is quite SLOW. You can easily wait over 30 minutes for a simple canned or bottled drink. If you question their lack of speed, they can get a drink to you in 15 minutes. They appear understaffed. The pool men are so helpful and kind. As far as the reception is concerned, they would rate a cheerful, friendly and helpful.
sample_comments.positives: Pools, Beach AND the Pool Men

sample_comments.title: Good hotel for family
sample_comments.text: The hotel is perfect for the family with small children. The swimming pools are nice and clean. It's a pity the front staff is not very friendly and will not allow late check-out although most of the rooms are still vacant.
sample_comments.positives: Nice Swimming Pool, Easy access to the beach, Quiet Surroundings

sample_comments.title: convenience
sample_comments.text: nice and convenience with good room condition. breakfast is nice and staff are very friendly.

sample_comments.title: So-so hotely
sample_comments.positives: Nice Pool, Beach Access, By the highway

sample_comments.title: Hotel's room quite old. Lots of mosquitoes
sample_comments.positives: Swimming pool, beach front, parking space

sample_comments.title: Great value for affordable price
sample_comments.positives: close to beach, good style and design, international breakfast

sample_comments.title: Great beach for families. Nice gardens.
sample_comments.text: Despite the rain, we had a wonderful stay. The Novotel is a great place to stay for families with young children. It is on a nice long stretch of beach, which was very clean and great for building sand castles. There weren't any annoying sales people hounding you to buy jewelry or dresses, so you could relax and enjoy time with your family. The breakfast was mediocre, not worth the cost. There are a few (1-2) other restaurants around for food, so you don't have to pay the high Novotel restaurant prices.
sample_comments.positives: This hotel has a great beach, children friendly pools, and nice gardens

sample_comments.title: nice garden and swimming pool
sample_comments.text: Fro relaxing and touch with the view of beach especially evening time
sample_comments.positives: nice garden, swimming pool, private beach

sample_comments.title: Great services
sample_comments.text: services and location are great. there is a beach next to the hotel and also a good pool.

sample_comments.title: Good Family resort
sample_comments.text: Rooms are average for the price but pleasant and well maintained. This is a Family oriented resort with large pools, nice beachfront setting. The bars and restaurants are overpriced but local options are available on the beach a few steps from the resort.

sample_comments.title: Quiet hotel
sample_comments.text:
stay here for 2 night is enough 
and rent mountain bike from the hotel ..
it take 40 min for cycling to ban phe city
it is wonderful 

the beach is clean
2 restaurants on the left side on the beach 
but the restaurants in ban phe city is much better

sample_comments.title: Old hotel, but in a good condition
sample_comments.text:
Stayed there for 2 nights. I had a car, and kept going to Rayong city, for meals. Nothing nearby that interested me. They have a few restaurants in the hotel, but I wanted the local fare. The beach was so so, especially since I came from Koh Chang just days prior.
The hotel being old, facilities like the pool, was old too. Good upkeep of the whole area though.
sample_comments.positives: Serene location, to get away from the world!

sample_comments.title: Good value for the money
sample_comments.text:
I would come back if I want an inexpensive, secluded beach trip. There is nothing to write home about outside of the resort. Luckily I am a resident here in Thailand so I was able to drive out and have some Thai food. The food in the hotel was very expensive so keep this in mind if you are coming down without transport. Add about 1000 baht (around 35 US dollars) for food per person.

The decor was not over done at all. 2 beautiful pools also. 

The hotel had a 2pm check in. I arrived at noon and had to wait 2 hours before I could get in. Beware of this. Not good.
sample_comments.positives: Nice beach to play on. Good view looking into the gulf on Thailand.

sample_comments.title: Nice swimming pool area
sample_comments.text:
We have stayed in this hotel a couple of times and were always very happy. Nice rooms, quiet and relaxing location, great swimming pool, nice restaurants. 

However this time we were very disappointed with the service in the Italian restaurant. We ordered a bottle of wine and waited 40 minutes. Then we were told, that this wine is not in stock. So we ordered another one and waited another 25 minutes. Food came, but not plates. After another 15 minutes the plates came but meanwhile the food was cold. Very disappointing.

Also this time check in and check out very slowly and the aircon was not working properly as well.

But o.k, this was only one time, all the other stays before no problems.

Location is very good if you like it quiet and if you like a quite nice beach. Otherwise there is not much to do and you need transportation.
sample_comments.positives:
huge and very nice swimming pool
very quiet location at the beach
sample_comments.negatives: Slow service

sample_comments.title: Overall nice experience
sample_comments.text: We stayed 6 days only but could have stayed longer if would have the time.There is a small little restaurant across the street where you can have breakfast and a nice dinner and buy beverages and snacks..The restaurant also owns a beachrestaurant approx 300 meters left on the beach.This was in our opinion the best beachbar/rest close to the hotel on the beach.There are no shops close to the hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Nice rooms and good standard.The pool area was attractive and there was also a second pool.Nice garden well kept.
sample_comments.negatives: Reception staff was not very efficient however not unfriendly in any way.In the morning you could find approx 25 % of the poolchairs occupied with towels only.After some questions the poolstaff admitted that they booked chairs for customers for the whole stay .This is something you have to find out yourself and obviously a way of getting "tip in disguise"

sample_comments.title: Best resort in Rayong
sample_comments.text: Novotel resort is a good recommendation if you are looking for a place 'tranquil'. It is a French hotel group but seems nobody can speak French in the reception and you have to speak English slowly.
sample_comments.positives: I like their 2 swimming pools, the SPA centre massage is good. There are good restaurants along the beach and opposite the resort with better price, their BBQ seafood are good. No need to buy breakfast in the hotel. Free shuttle bus to down town every morning.
sample_comments.negatives:
The buffet has not much food selection, ice cream only has 1 choice. The sand has been poluted by gasoline. My swimwear and sandles are stained.
Souvenir price in Rayong is more expensive than Bangkok night market.

sample_comments.title: Good value
sample_comments.text: not too far from Bangkok, only 2 h 30, good location on the beach, international and Thai customers, quiet beach, few restaurants around, food in the hotel not so good, good for family with children, good value for money.
sample_comments.negatives: a little bit old, some items need to be renew

sample_comments.title: Beautiful area
sample_comments.text:
Very quiet hotel.Not near any other tourist attractions or shops.Pool and beach very clean and lovely scenery .Room could be a bit better needs updating especially shower.
Thankyou to staff in breakfast room for being so welcoming and supplying gluten free bread
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your thoughtful feedback with us. We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere of our hotel, as well as our clean pool and beach and the lovely surrounding scenery.

We also sincerely appreciate your comments regarding the room and shower facilities. Your suggestion about updating the room has been noted and shared with our management team for future improvement planning.

It is especially wonderful to know that our breakfast team made you feel welcome and were able to provide gluten-free bread to meet your needs. Your kind words will be shared with them and will certainly encourage our staff to continue delivering attentive and personalized service.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another relaxing stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Supichaya Chumruedee
Front Office Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: This was a get what you pay for place. No bells and whistles and the rooms are pretty dated. Our room overlooked the car park :) As a vegan it was hard as the staff had no knowledge but overall we had a couple of nice days at the pool and beach. There are nice restaurants within walking distance on the beach.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Khun Max,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. I'm glad to hear that you had a couple of nice days by the pool and beach.

I understand your concerns regarding the room and vegan food options. While our property provides a simple beachfront experience, I appreciate your comments and will ensure our team receives more training on dietary requirements to better accommodate guests with specific preferences.

I hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future. Safe travels!

Warm regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room 2 Single Beds, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel but far away
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel with beautiful beach. Set back - had to get taxi or grab if you leave the hotel. Buffet breakfast is kinda expensive & not included in stay
sample_comments.response:
Dear Amutha,

Thank you for sharing your feedback following your stay with us. I'm delighted to hear you enjoyed the beautiful beach and found the hotel nice for your visit.

I understand that our location may feel a bit far from certain conveniences, and we're sorry for any inconvenience this caused. We aim to provide a peaceful retreat by the beach, and we appreciate your understanding regarding the need for taxis or Grab rides for exploring the area.

Regarding breakfast, we strive to offer a diverse buffet to meet various tastes, and your feedback about pricing is noted and valued. Booking room with a breakfast included does offer a better value. We hope that overall, your experience with us was enjoyable.

We would be delighted to welcome you and your family back for another stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room 2 Single Beds, Garden View

Best regards,
Olga Gergenkop
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Amazed by slipper policy.
sample_comments.positives: Overall good but a bit quiet
sample_comments.negatives:
Found policy that slippers are re-used. First time I was ever told that they belonged to the room. So I used slippers worn by someone else. And the next guest uses the same one again.

That is such a ridiculous policy. Better then to have no slippers in the room at all.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text:
Despite having about 30 Sea view rooms empty due to Covid they still want £50 a night extra to upgrade,you would think they might reward people that stay at their hotel in these troubled times err no.
Says ironing facilities in room,no there isn't 
Wifi in room not a lot of good,ok if you stand on one leg in the middle of the room with phone raised above your head i found...
Beach covered in plastic waste,everybody looks at it and casually walks by or leaves some more.
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Great stay for a couple of days
sample_comments.positives: Excellent breakfast. Clean private beach. Large swimming pools and a nice gym.
sample_comments.negatives: The rooms aren't very large. TV had problems working, and the water would often change temperature randomly.

sample_comments.title: Good
sample_comments.text: We have stayed here many times but were disappointed this time. The furnishings have changed such that there is no place to put your things including clothing. It is like they expect us to literally live off our suitcase. We were placed in a room very near to the reception and ballroom, and there was a company outing party on until almost mignight, with very loud music. When we tried to get extra supply of toilet paper (there was only one helf used roll in the room), we didn't get attention for a while until I went down to the reception cunter to follow up. When the women in the party wanted to use the Jacuzzi pool, there were men from the party standing around there to smoke, making it most uncomfortable for the women to use the pool so they had to give up. So overall it was not a good experience this time.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful Property. Multiple pools the beach in the area was very nice.
sample_comments.negatives: I was there for three nights and I did not have a shit warm shower once. The best that it was was lukewarm.

sample_comments.title: Decent enough
sample_comments.positives: The location near the beach was very good
sample_comments.negatives: Just quite old so most of the stuff not in a good condition. Wifi not stable

sample_comments.title: Ok Hotel
sample_comments.text: Good location, but a bit old

sample_comments.title: Relaxing
sample_comments.positives: Room, food (Breakfast), staff all great as usual!. We keep coming back.
sample_comments.negatives: Internet - Day or night always slow. Luckily I don't come here for the that however it would be nice if it was faster.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant stay
sample_comments.text: Very friendly and welcoming staff. The grounds are very pleasant, 2 pools and a 3rd pool for children. The stretch of beach outside the hotel is really nice and clean. The hotel is an old hotel and although the rooms are perfectly adequate, the bathroom felt a little small and old. But everything worked. The Shore restaurant was nice for lunch. Would go again.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable and quiet break. Very isolated area but there is enough to fill a long weekend relaxing.
sample_comments.positives:
The hotel was nicely set out, easy access to each of the pools, restaurants and bars. Reception staff were helpful (with the use of google translate occasionally). The spa was great had a really nice massage and we also did a cookery class that was good fun. 
The hotel is directly on the beach so it was a nice walk to go along the beach and you could walk many kilometres on flat even sand. Nice local food stalls if you want a change from the hotel but hotal food is also good and not overpriced.
sample_comments.negatives: The Jacuzzi was cold and the water very dirty unfortunately. It would have been nice as there is a cold plunge to have been able to use the pair as they should be hot to cold not cold to cold.

sample_comments.title: nice service, but room need an imprive
sample_comments.text: The room is just okay, need a little bit improve, seems run down but still okay for a short break. Staff all good, especially spa staff that I've use their service, very intention. Nice beach and swimming pool.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable stay in a well managed resort
sample_comments.positives: The resort was full but it did not feel too crowded, the resort is well managed. Special mention to the manager Olga, who was very attentive and made our stay special.
sample_comments.negatives: The equipment in the gym is broken and it has been broken for a long time since it was already broken 2 years ago when we stayed before. It should be repaired.

sample_comments.title: Very average rooms
sample_comments.text: Overall quite decent, except that the room was a very average room, something I would expect in Thailand in a hotel which charges around 1200 baht.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.negatives:
No charge point for the car available.
Wifi signal is not very strong.
The water drainage in the bathroom was poor. (Wet floor all the time.)

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.negatives:
If you don't get a room with sea view, there is a good chance that you'll be put in an "ok" room.

But the beach is only few steps away tho.

I know that you'll get what you pay for but my expectation was a bit too high, I guess.

sample_comments.title: Good Location, Good View, can arrange as requested
sample_comments.text: Happy and Enjoys
sample_comments.positives: Location swimming pool is near the beach. Connection rooms and services.

sample_comments.title: Overall good for family.
sample_comments.negatives: Only 2 water bottle provided in our deluxe room with a family of 3. Had to call and and policy of 2 bottle was stated. After reasoning that we are three people more bottles were provided. I walked in to the breakfast area from the adjacent pool to fill my water bottle while some lady was citing me some rules. Certainly did not enjoy this while being a paying guest paying premium prices. Will post this in google review as well.

sample_comments.title: Nicest pool
sample_comments.text: This resort is quite far from Rayong, so transportation should be booked in advance - no taxis in Rayong city center. Big resort and the main pool area is really, really nice. Quiet location in off-season so there is really nothing else in the outside of the hotel area. Two restaurants in the resort, ok but not a big fan of the Italian restaurant. We took complimentary transportation to Ban Phe pier as we were on our way to Koh Samet. The driver dropped us to the "ticket office", and pointed the lady selling us the tickets to Samet. We ended up paying 4 times more expensive ferry tickets than normally so pls do ask around and not buy the tickets from the first seller.

sample_comments.title: We enjoyed our stay as a family. It was refreshing and relaxing
sample_comments.positives:
Location on the beach. 
Nearby Italian restaurant and 7-11
Clean, family friendly
sample_comments.negatives: Wheelchair access is not complete at all points

sample_comments.title: Valuable
sample_comments.text: My family has a wonferful time there. We plan to revisit this hotel again for sure.

sample_comments.title: It's ok for family vacation.
sample_comments.negatives: pool not clean

sample_comments.title: many pools and very closed to the beach
sample_comments.text: Very busy but all staffs were friendly

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Junior Suite - very nice, comfortable - good quality
sample_comments.negatives: beach area - no sun beds/umbrellas...

sample_comments.title: Very relaxing very quiet in week busy at weekends
sample_comments.text:
It is a nice hotel many miles from main bars and restaurants you need a car which means 1 person can not drink the Internet was poor 
They offer to upgrade to super Internet for extra 5 pounds a day and the restaurant is more expensive then the normal restaurants but clean hotel service is good quick check in and check out but overall good hotel if you are happy to drive out and eat and happy with the Internet

sample_comments.title: Good Service
sample_comments.text: Good

sample_comments.title: A nice escape from Bangkok.
sample_comments.text: We had a nice relaxing time at Novotel. The room was very nice, free internet, lovely pools and gardens with lots of things for children to do and the staff were friendly. Our only disappointment was the food at the hotel. I never send food back (ever) but I had to this time- a first for me, which is a real shame. We had three meals there, then my children refused to eat there anymore.
sample_comments.positives: The pools are lovely and the whole place has a very relaxed holiday atmosphere.

sample_comments.title: big room and clean
sample_comments.text: The staffs are friendly, polite, willing to assist you with your queries and always put on a smile. The room was big and feel cosy.

sample_comments.title: nice beach, clean room
sample_comments.text:
It was a fantastic hotel. We enjoyed relaxing by pool side.You can access the beach easily.
Good location if you want to stay away from big city. I think this place is the answer.
sample_comments.positives: nice beach, good swimming pool, good view

sample_comments.title: peace and relax
sample_comments.text: this hotel is quite far from the city so you have to plan your trip and transportation in advance you may take 1 hour form the city center. This hotel is qiute old but they renovate some part to be practical you can have this hotel to stay to relax or retreat yourself becuase it has silent condition that someone may like that. The hotel staff is O.K. but not in the level of 4 or 5 stars standard. food is quite expensive in the hotel but if you dont have your own private car it will difficult to eat outside.

sample_comments.title: Good location near beach
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel good location clean room and nice staff

good service

sample_comments.title: Slightly lower than expect
sample_comments.text:
Slightly lower than expect because the room is getting old and need to renovate before get back to 3-4 star hotel again.

But good thing is staff service are really good.
sample_comments.positives: Quiet, Big Pool and Not distance from beach socialize

sample_comments.title: Good room with the private beach.
sample_comments.positives: Close to the beach, good swimming pool, not too far from local places

sample_comments.title: Great Hotel, good for family.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is great for Family travel with young children. Kids love swimming pools, with small slider, and private beach. The hotel is also located not far from local market and the pier to Samed Island.

sample_comments.title: Nice and comfortable
sample_comments.text: I stayed in Novotel Rayong for 3 nights and overall was happy with my stay. The room was clean and comfortable and the facilities (pool etc) very nice. The beach in front of the hotel is very clean. Breakfast was not included in my roomrate and I was a bit disappointed that there were no options other than the main breakfast buffet, which I thought at 400 thb was overpriced (there are some local restaurant around though). The airconditioning in the room was also very loud and noise from other rooms (showers mainly) and the corridor was a bit disturbing.

sample_comments.title: Great location with excellent swimming pool
sample_comments.text: good swimming pool and beach. good for relaxing and swimming. there is no breakfast include in agoda price.

sample_comments.title: Beachfront hotel but nothing speacial
sample_comments.text:
Stayed there for a night. Did not expect too much, and that's probably a good thing. Got a room in the old building wing (tower 2 I think) on third floor. Room was ok, garden/pool view, clean bathroom, ok bed, and the air con worked just fine. Let down by 19th century TV with nothing worth watching on. Had to settle to watch a game of football at the beach bar, which was nice nonetheless with chill sea breeze. Overall, one of the better hotels around at this price I think we're ok with it.

Downside: There was a group function in the garden in front of the beach banging on loud speaker and ridiculous karaoke sining. For those who were seeking for a quiet time to recharge their energy on a beachfront stay, this was a turn off.

sample_comments.title: Good swimming pools for children
sample_comments.text: The hotel has 3 swimming pools. It was good for children. There are 2 restaurants, Thai and Italian. Food (dinner) was ok but not that great comparing to the price and waiting time. Breakfast was also not that good but acceptable. Beach was nice but there were too many speed boats at the beach. The speed boats ruined the ocean view. The hotel does not provide a bottle opener so you need to bring from home.

sample_comments.title: Lovely Hotel near to beac nice views of beach
sample_comments.text: Relaxing, close to beach, nice pools, and very peaceful

sample_comments.title: OK hotel with private beach area
sample_comments.text: Room is okay but there are water flow trouble with toilet & shower room. Renovation may be neccessary. Private beach is nice. However, there are not enough amount of chairs for guess. Available chairs were occupied from morning time by guesses.

sample_comments.title: Nice looking pool area
sample_comments.text: even though i booked ahead and asked for certain things in the extras ,i did not get them and when i enquired at reception on arriaval i was met by blank faces from non english speaking staff.i would have thought that novotel hotels being world wide would at least have english speaking staff.the room was ok,not what i asked for, but adequate.

sample_comments.title: Lovely family hotel
sample_comments.text:
My family and me were here already many times in the past and always my kids (no already grown up) loved to stay in this hotel. Unfortunately the big pool was under renovation (not told by Agoda) so we have to stay in the smaller pool, but no problem.
Beach was as beautiful as before and also clean. (no jellyfish).
I think for future the hotel needs to renovate not only the pool but as well the rooms which are a little bit old fashion. Prices for food and drinks are usual expensive and should a little bit lower according the low season promotions.
sample_comments.positives: nice garden - pool for the kids - pool for adults- very nice beach

sample_comments.title: a litttle out of the way
sample_comments.text: The hotel itself is pretty and the staff friendly at all times. The location is nice for the beach as you can walk straight on to it past the bar, however, it's dirty with bottles and plastic bags. The room is big enough although the bathroom a little 'pokey'. A large swimming pool presents itself as a nice to spend a sunny afternoon, especially if you have children.

sample_comments.title: good location
sample_comments.text:
This is not the first time at this hotel for our family but every time oc our return the hotel reamins same Novotel very good maintenance I must say even years passed. We love the location where we can enjoy the private beach as well as going
shopping at Ban Pae or to Samaed Island.

sample_comments.title: nice place & great location
sample_comments.text:
Generally Novotel Rayong is good, room rate is reasonable but only "Breakfast" that looks a quite high charge due to there are a few options to have them.

Room is clean and fully amenities.
sample_comments.positives: Great location with the private beach

sample_comments.title: good infrastructure tired but clean
sample_comments.text: while rooms are about 3 star at best the public areas are fine
sample_comments.positives: staff good not much english spoken but not a real issue

sample_comments.title: Resort with all inclusive feeling
sample_comments.text: novotel is a very nice resort where all is provided. the pools are nice for the cjildren. it is friendly for families with children. the prices level are higher then in the neiboring areas like ban phe and mae phim. if you want a all inclusive feeling and do not mind paying a preimium this can be a place for you. the resort is situated a fair distance from nearest town. a long the beach you have a few restauratns serving food and a few nebouring resorts.
sample_comments.positives: Nice pool area and friendly staff

sample_comments.title: very cozy and private. Worth for money.
sample_comments.text: There are not too many hotels in Rayong that are worth for money to spend. I give the credit to Novotel for making green and lovely environmental hotel that makes me fel like livig at home as it offers me privacy and good facility. Spa also is very good to try after enjoy time at the beach. My very first review of this hotel comes after I finished my third visit. Have fun an enjoy it,
sample_comments.positives: I love the environment and food. Beach is very neat and very relax.
sample_comments.negatives: I expect more hotel activities and less of Thai group that make loud noise

sample_comments.title: great hotel but isolated location
sample_comments.text:
Very good hotel environment. Can direct reach the beach after go through the swimming pool and garden. I like the low densty design of this hotel. The ratio of common facility area is high compare to the guest room.
The location is quite far from town. If you would like to have dinner outside the hotel, there is quite far and not much choice if you not go to Rayong city. Very good for short vacation.
sample_comments.positives: great swimming pool and great gerden. beach hotel
sample_comments.negatives: quite far from town

sample_comments.title: for vacation
sample_comments.text:
packing not enough at front of hotel must across street
activity cost is fair
good drinking promotion
sample_comments.negatives: room no sea view

sample_comments.title: nice clean
sample_comments.text: Generally, it's up to its standard what are you looking for.
sample_comments.positives: great location, easy access, friendly staff
sample_comments.negatives: the rooms were not ready aft 2pm

sample_comments.title: Quiet trip
sample_comments.text: The hotel is quiet and it is on the beach. Very nice and friendly staff. I like the food there. But if you look for a more exciting life...this one might not suit you. It's located a bit far from market, shop, have to have your own transportation.
sample_comments.negatives: A little far away from other attractions

sample_comments.title: Quiet and relaxing
sample_comments.text: The Novotel is used a lot for conferences, so can be busy at times (when the conferences take a break) but the pool was quiet most of the time. The food was good (with the exception of breakfast which was ordinary and overpriced), but quite expensive. The beach is clean and has some pleasant local restaurants - nothing flash but good food.
sample_comments.positives: Well appointed rooms, nice pools, right next to huge beach
sample_comments.negatives: Breakfast poor value

sample_comments.title: Good hotel in Rayong
sample_comments.text: If you want to stay in Rayong, this hotel is the good choice. With their reasonable price and standard in service. There is private beach but pool is too small. It is better for family but not good for couple. Parking area should have roof or indoor. Location is good for relaxing. It's better if price is including breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Good but overpriced, unfriendly front desk staff
sample_comments.text: This older hotel has excellent swimming pools with a nice beach. The breakfast was also good and dinner with live music was enjoyable. It's a great option for 1-2 days with children or to just read a book by the pool and relax. Transport is a major issue. The hotel offers a very limited free shuttle into town. The lack of low-cost and free transport means the hotel offers "packages" that include transport and these are extremely overpriced. They are not helpful with taxis or any other requests. Taxis in town are also in on the "tourist trap" and charge a lot of money. I was able to get a Grab driver once for a better deal. Hotel prices are expensive and inexpensive rooms do not offer a beach or pool view. They are dark and the TV reception was bad. Internet is not good enough to use Netflix. For the area, I recommend staying on Ko Samet instead. People are friendlier and prices are better.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Hollie

Thank you for you kind feedback from your most recent stay with us. We are so happy that you were able to join us here in stunning Rayong. We are pleased to read that you found our property beautiful and our pools to be excellent.
Providing guest with a memorable holiday is our goal here at the Novotel Rim Pae, as your stay with us is important. Our property is situated on the beach and one that we hope our guest get to have the opportunity to enjoy the beauty of Amazing Thailand. If a guest would like to explore outside and into near by town we are easily situated between Baan Pae Twon and Mae Pim. . I am very sorry to hear that you felt our team was unfriendly at the front desk,I assure you that our entire team is here to serve our wonderful guests,! Service is the heart of our property and our team will most certainly follow up to resolve this matter and thank you so much for sharing you, and we hope to see you again.
Best wishes, The Novotel Team & Management

sample_comments.title: Pleasant hotel but some drawbacks
sample_comments.text:
Our Superior Room (213) was definitely on the small size, far too minimalist in décor for us, plus dark furniture The beds were a little on the hard side but not too hard but the pillows were nice and large. There were 2 OK 'easy chairs' and 1 upright chair by the table plus a good sized hanging space and enough drawers. A good sized in-room safe, tea/coffee facilities plus a mini-fridge made up the facilities in the room. TV was an old fashioned CRT but a good size and a good picture. Not many channels though. Air-con was powerful and did a good job, albeit sometimes got somewhat noisy. There was a small balcony with 2 plastic chairs but poor view. Bathroom was pretty tiny albeit with a large and deep sink, good for washing clothes. The shower was the in-bath type but water pressure was surprisingly good. However, temperature control was not so good and frequently shifted between hot and cold. We had one power cut and it was not nice on a boiling hot afternoon to have the air-con etc die on one. Power came back after about 15 minutes but not a good state of affairs for a 4 star hotel. Also the hot water was non-existent on both the last night we were there and on the morning of our departure.
Breakfast was dreadful, especially at 412 baht each, poor in quality and high in price. The 2 other restaurants have 2 menus, one Italian, one Thai and International, and you can have both menus at either restaurant. Not a wide choice but OK and quality much better than breakfast for the Thai dishes, not the European. Service throughout was excellent, for us one of the strengths of the hotel. We never came across anything except utmost courtesy, politeness and helpfulness from every member of staff that we met, for us, an unequivocal 5 stars for service. Internet access was a definite disappointment with very limited availability. The hotel had 3 decent small to medium sized swimming pools. The beach in front of the hotel was good and well maintained.

We was informed from the reception that the spa has opened but once arrived at the spa, it was closed. We were lucky to meet a gardener who phoned the spa staff for us. sample_comments.title: bigger swimming pool closed for renovation
sample_comments.text:
When we arrived the reception informed us the big swimming pool is closed for maintenance until October 2011.
Anyway the hotel still has a reasonable sized second pool.
The beach is nice sand and clean, the water in the sea is safe even though it has some larger waves for Thailand.
Dinner in the restaurant we were disappointed as the service was slow and not what we expected, this was probably due to a big group function at the same time elsewhere in the hotel.
There is a nearby beach cafe "Pol's" which is cheap and cheerful good for a snack of BBQ seafood or chicken, and good for breakfast. You need to be laidback and ask what they have rather than rely on the menu if you want an early breakfast (before 11am). Hotel has a good buffet breakfast. We had 2 rooms with connecting door. One room was a bit smelly like musty so maybe it has not been occupied or the a/c may need servicing. When we complained they just sprayed with air freshener. The bathrooms were modern and nicely fitted, but the shower was very weak in water flow and only tepid water.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing break by the sea
sample_comments.text:
A nice hotel with direct access to the beach. Well laid out gardens carefully maintained by staff.
There are several pools in the grounds for guests to choose from and pool staff keep them clean. Breakfast menu gives a reasonable choice of food. The poolside restaurant has a wide variety of international food as well as Thai. There is a nice beach stretching for several kilometers with safe swimming. Unfortunately not cleaned regularly to the standard tourists would like. The rooms are clean and comfortable with a balcony to relax on. Pool view rooms have a much better aspect over pools and gardens. Staff are efficient and helpful. The lack of a guest lift can be a problem for handicapped people. Your own transport is advisable as the hotel is some distance from shops and other attractions.

sample_comments.title: Lovely spot
sample_comments.text: The Novotel is on a beautiful beach with views across to Koh Samet. Our initial room was a bit dingy and overlooked the car park which was not a good start. I asked to move and the only available room was at a 500 Baht per night premium which we took. It was much nicer; brighter, views of the pool and more modern. The breakfast was good and the pools, spa and gym are great. nice for a long weekend spot.

sample_comments.title: Novotel Rayong
sample_comments.text:
Novotel was a nice stay for us during a long holiday weekend. We got off to a bad start when the reception demanded 2000 baht or a credit card to secure the minibar. We never use the minibar and felt as if they were implying that we would leave without paying our bill. This was very insulting and a really bad way to begin our stay, especially at a 4 star resort.

The bed was a torture and the pillow was as thin as a sheet of paper. There was only one extra pillow. There was also only one umbrella provided during rainy season. There was no water pressure in the shower and little hot water. I would qualify it as barely warm. Our room did not respond to the key card after one day and we had to go to reception to get it sorted. Parking was difficult to find and the guards were barely helpful in this regard.

Things got better from there, however. The resort is nice with a lovely beach. The pools provided plenty of room for the many guests. The restaurant was ok, but pricey for what you get. Breakfast was fine. Overall, this was a nice stay, mostly due to the beautiful beach and the close proximity to many beachfront dining options that offer far better food at much better value.
